items.title: Best Apple weekend deals ahead of Mother’s Day: AirPods, Apple Watch Series 11 all-time lows, MacBooks $300 off, iPads, more
items.summary:
The first weekend in May has arrived and with it we are tracking a host of big-time deals on Apple gear ahead of Mother’s Day. Joining price drops on AirPods Pro 3 and AirPods 4 at $99, we are also tracking new all-time low pricing on several Apple Watch Series 11 models with deals starting from $299 and as much as $160 slashed from the list prices. The new 2026 MacBook deals are in full force as well, with deep discounts across both the MacBook Air and Pro lineups (as much as $300 off), as well as M4 iPad Air deals and some seriously notable M3 iPad clearance deals at up to $300 off. All of that alongside some accessory offers are organized for you down below.

items.title: Electrified Weekly – Lectric e-bikes get up to $793 savings, ENGWE e-bikes get up to $1,048 savings, Exclusive mini dirt bike low, more
items.summary:
Welcome to 9to5Toys Electrified Weekly – the best place to find all of this week’s best deals and new releases to electrify your life and protect Mother Nature. This week, while we’ve seen great deals in all four of our green tech categories, it’s been the e-bikes and EVs that have been especially packed. We’ve got Lectric’s Mother’s Day Sale with up to $793 e-bike savings starting from $799, as well as Ride1Up’s latest savings event giving us a new all-time low price on the Prodigy V2 Mid-Drive 9-Speed e-bike. There’s also ENGWE’s 12th Anniversary Sale with up to $1,048 savings on three of its newest e-bikes starting from $999, as well as Heybike’s 5th Anniversary Sale dropping the Mars 3.0 Folding Fat Tire e-bike back to the $1,199 low for the first time in 2026, a returning Segway Max G30P e-scooter low, an exclusive new mini electric dirt bike low, and so much more. Head on down below to check out all the best Green Deals we’ve collected for you over the week.
